---
name: "\U0001F50C Integration"
about: Request a new integration or report an issue with an existing one
title: "[INTEGRATION] "
labels: integration
assignees: seldonrios

---

## 🔌 Integration Summary
Describe the integration request or issue.

Examples:
- New API integration
- Hardware support
- Device communication problem
- Authentication issue
- Data sync bug

---

## 🎯 Goal / Use Case
What are you trying to accomplish with this integration?

Describe:
- the external system or device
- the workflow you want
- why this matters

---

## 🧩 Integration Type
Check all that apply:

- [ ] External API
- [ ] Local service
- [ ] Hardware device
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Messaging platform
- [ ] Voice / media system
- [ ] Smart home / IoT
- [ ] Camera / AV / sensor system
- [ ] Developer tool
- [ ] Other: _______

---

## 🏷️ System / Vendor / Platform
Provide details about the external system:

- Product / Service Name:
- Vendor:
- Version / Firmware:
- OS / Platform:
- Relevant SDK / API version:

---

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What should the integration do?

---

## ❌ Actual Behavior
What is happening instead?

---

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
If reporting a problem, explain how to reproduce it:

1. Configure '...'
2. Connect / authenticate '...'
3. Trigger '...'
4. Observe issue

---

## 🔐 Authentication / Access Context
Check any relevant details:

- [ ] No authentication required
- [ ] API key
- [ ] OAuth
- [ ] Username / password
- [ ] Local network access
- [ ] Certificate / token-based auth
- [ ] Other: _______

Do not include secrets in this issue.

---

## 📡 Connection / Environment Details
Please provide anything relevant:

- Local or remote system:
- IP / hostname pattern (redact as needed):
- Network conditions:
- Ports / protocol involved:
- Container / VM / bare metal:
- Proxy / firewall / VPN involved:

---

## 📤 Logs / Responses / Error Messages
Add relevant logs or API errors.

```text
Paste logs here
```

---

## 🛠️ Workarounds Tried
List any workarounds, tests, or alternate methods you tried.

---

## 📈 Priority / Impact
How important is this?

- [ ] 🔴 Critical
- [ ] 🟠 High
- [ ] 🟡 Medium
- [ ] 🟢 Low

Who benefits?
- [ ] End users
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] Both

---

## 🤝 Contribution Interest
Would you like to help test or implement this?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe
- [ ] No
